title: 3D maps Voxy Addon
description: Full-screen world map addon for Voxy LOD mod
body:
## ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f2567fb1d9d3e4a85dae1b1724d523e2053ea57.png) 
**Forget flat, boring minimaps! VoxyMap is an innovative client-side mod that turns your standard world preview into a fully interactive, fullscreen 3D map. By utilizing data from the Voxy mod, you can admire the generated terrain on a massive scale, far exceeding standard Minecraft chunk render distances.**

**Key Features:**

- True 3D Experience: The map looks like a massive, three-dimensional preview of your world—no more flat textures!

- Massive Render Distance: Rendering is powered by Voxy data, allowing you to seamlessly view huge expanses of terrain.

- Smooth Camera Controls: Freely rotate, pan, and zoom the view using your mouse and keyboard.

- Client-Side: Works entirely on the client side—no server installation required!

- Full support for English, Polish, and Russian languages.

![Mapsgif](https://i.imgur.com/LiorhHU.gif)

**Controls & Usage**


- Left mouse button - grab and drag the map.
- Middle mouse button - rotate the camera left or right.
- W/A/S/D or Arrow keys - move the map camera.
- Shift - move faster.
- Mouse wheel - zoom toward the cursor.
- C - center the map on the player.
- M or Esc - close the map.

**Requirements & Installation**


- Game Version: Minecraft 1.21.11

- Mod Loader: Fabric Loader & Fabric API

- Required Mod: Voxy (best tested with version 0.2.15-beta)

 **Important!**

**This mod is not an official add-on by the creator of Voxy!**

The mod is not fully finished yet, so bugs may occur. If you find any issues, you can report them on the mod’s GitHub page.
